title: Travel English
description: The minimum English to survive abroad!

scenes.speech: With travel English you can go anywhere in the world! ✈️
scenes.title: English for the Road
scenes.content: This lesson is about travel English. Learn only the truly essential phrases for airports, hotels, and sightseeing.

scenes.speech: First gate at the airport — immigration!
scenes.title: Immigration
scenes.content: If asked 'What's the purpose of your visit?' answer with one word like 'Sightseeing.' or 'Studying.'
scenes.highlight:
Q: Purpose of visit?
A: Sightseeing. / Studying.

scenes.speech: At the hotel, 'I have a reservation' is the magic line!
scenes.title: Hotel Check-in
scenes.content: I have a reservation. My name is ___. With this you can check in by your name. The key is the line 'I have a reservation.'
scenes.highlight:
I have a reservation.
My name is ___ .

scenes.title: Asking Directions
scenes.content: Excuse me, where is the station? Essential when asking for the station, the bus stop, the bathroom, etc.

scenes.speech: Asking the price is super important!
scenes.title: Asking the Price
scenes.content: How much is this? You'll use it shopping every time. Even when there's no price tag, this one line tells you.
scenes.highlight:
How much is this?
How much does it cost?

scenes.speech: It's OK to say 'I don't speak English well.'
scenes.title: When in Trouble
scenes.content: I don't speak English well. Could you speak slowly, please? You don't need to be perfect; honesty wins.
scenes.highlight:
I don't speak English well.
Could you speak slowly?

scenes.speech: Asking for Wi-Fi puts you at ease!
scenes.title: Wi-Fi
scenes.content: Is there Wi-Fi? What's the password? With these two at cafes or hotels, you're online in seconds.
scenes.highlight:
Is there Wi-Fi?
What's the password?

scenes.title: Emergencies
scenes.content: Help! Call the police! Where is the hospital? Practice out loud so they jump out fast if needed.
scenes.highlight:
Help!
Call the police!
Where is the hospital?

scenes.speech: Travel is a treasure of encounters — enjoy the chats!
scenes.title: Talking with Locals
scenes.content: 'Where are you from?' is the first question travelers everywhere ask. Reply 'I'm from Japan.' — simple is fine!
scenes.highlight:
Q: Where are you from?
A: I'm from Japan.

scenes.speech: Quiz! How do you say 'How much?' in English?
scenes.quizQuestion: How do you ask 'How much is this?' in English?
scenes.quizExplanation: How much is this? is the basic phrase for asking the price. A must in shopping.
